name_en: Includes full original retail packaging 💖 M's most special biker bag this year, featuring new vintage-soft calfskin. Classic nostalgic style, soft leather, full leather lining, multi-pocket design blurs the line between function and decoration. Distinctive personality, versatile for various styles, sweet yet edgy, great capacity. Almost everyone has one, as popular as the MiuWander.
